chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Rev. Application No.D- 61 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE For hearing of main case 14-02-2024 Mr. Rukhsar Ahmed Junejo, Advocate for applicant. ***** Learned counsel for applicant, under instructions, does not press this Crl. Revision Application, as the case has been decided by the trial Court. Accordingly, this application is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
